delta_candidates.title: Trace citations before agent use
delta_candidates.agent_facing_delta: Require each agent-facing answer to retain fixture citation IDs for every promoted claim.

delta_candidates.title: Ask before filling missing permit facts
missing_information_prompts: Which permit number, address, or PP&D document identifier should be used?
delta_candidates.agent_facing_delta: Ask for missing permit identifiers instead of inventing them.

delta_candidates.title: Refuse official action requests
delta_candidates.agent_facing_delta: Refuse requests to submit, pay, upload, certify, cancel, or otherwise perform official PP&D actions.

delta_candidates.title: Block consequential automation
delta_candidates.agent_facing_delta: Keep automation offline and fixture-bound unless a separate authorized workflow exists.

delta_candidates.title: Keep generated material reversible
delta_candidates.agent_facing_delta: Produce drafts, checklists, and validation notes only; do not mutate active PP&D records.

delta_candidates.title: Journal only safe offline events
delta_candidates.agent_facing_delta: Journal fixture validation metadata only, without auth state, traces, raw crawl output, or downloaded documents.

delta_candidates.title: Preserve rollback readiness
delta_candidates.agent_facing_delta: Keep packet outputs deterministic and replaceable so failed fixture promotions can be rolled back cleanly.

delta_candidates.title: Expose exact offline validation
delta_candidates.agent_facing_delta: Report exact offline validation commands and do not require live PP&D access.
